title: RED Scented Rose Candle – Glass JAR for Romantic Dinners, Valentine’S, Weddings
features: TYPE: Scented Rose Candle in a Glass Holder.
WAX: 100% Paraffin Wax for a clean burn.
COLOUR: Elegant red hue for a romantic touch.
BURN TIME: Approx. 3 hours of lasting fragrance.
FRAGRANCE: 3% Rose Scented for a soothing floral aroma.
description: Create a warm and inviting atmosphere with the Red Scented Rose Candle in Glass, perfect for romantic dinners, weddings, anniversaries, and heartfelt gifts. - Crafted from 100% paraffin wax, delivering a clean and consistent burn. - Infused with a delicate rose fragrance, enhancing relaxation and ambiance. - Designed in an elegant glass holder, making it a perfect decorative accent. - Ideal for cozy evenings, special occasions, and meaningful gifting.
